title: Skyward Group Leverages Apollo Acquisition to Expand Skyward Specialty's Life Sciences Solution Globally
author: Globe Newswire
description: Skyward Group announced the global expansion of Skyward Specialty's Life Sciences insurance solution by leveraging Apollo's Lloyd's Syndicate 1969 following the acquisition closure. This marks the first strategic collaboration between the two organizations, enabling enhanced multinational placements for U.S.-domiciled life sciences companies with international operations.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company successfully closed the Apollo acquisition and immediately identified synergistic opportunities, launching a strategic collaboration to expand its Life Sciences product globally. This demonstrates effective integration and growth potential.
The expansion of its Life Sciences insurance solution to global markets through Apollo's Lloyd's platform represents new revenue opportunities and enhanced service capabilities for its client base.

title: Skyward Specialty Announces Completion of Apollo Acquisition
author: Na
description: Skyward Specialty Insurance Group (Nasdaq: SKWD) announced the completion of its acquisition of Apollo Group Holdings Limited, a U.K.-based Lloyd's of London insurance platform. The acquisition was completed at previously agreed upon terms and has received approval from regulatory authorities and minority shareholders. Skyward Specialty operates through nine underwriting divisions and maintains A (Excellent) ratings from A.M. Best Company.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Successful completion of a strategic acquisition with regulatory and shareholder approval demonstrates business expansion, operational growth, and market confidence. The company is described as 'rapidly growing and innovative' with strong financial ratings (A-rated by A.M. Best).

title: Skyward Specialty Promotes John Burkhart to President, U.S. Property & Casualty
author: Andrew Robinson
description: Skyward Specialty Insurance Group promotes John Burkhart to President, U.S. Property & Casualty, expanding his leadership role to oversee additional divisions and support the company's strategic growth.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company is highlighting strategic leadership development, expanding roles, and preparing for future growth with confidence in their executive team

title: Skyward Specialty Insurance Group Reports Third Quarter 2025 Results
author: Skyward Specialty Insurance Group, Inc.
description: Skyward Specialty reported strong Q3 2025 financial results, with net income of $45.9 million, a 51.6% increase in gross written premiums, and a combined ratio of 89.2%. The company highlighted growth in agriculture and credit (re)insurance divisions and maintained a disciplined underwriting approach.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Strong financial performance with significant premium growth, improved combined ratio, increased net income, and positive outlook for future acquisitions and market strategy

title: Skyward Specialty to Host Third Quarter 2025 Earnings Call Thursday, October 30, 2025
author: Kevin Reed
description: Skyward Specialty Insurance Group plans to release its Q3 2025 earnings on October 29th, with an earnings call scheduled for October 30th at 12:00 p.m. EST. The company will provide financial results via webcast and conference call.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Standard earnings release announcement with no significant positive or negative indicators, routine financial communication
